_description: Transparent overlay layers for video compositing. Each slide renders as a PNG with alpha transparency, intended to be overlaid on video using ffmpeg. Use 'position' to place content on screen, or set 'lower-third' for a broadcast-style bar.

_slots.headline: optional — primary text on the overlay. 1–8 words at 64px (42px in lower-third mode).
_slots.subtitle: optional — secondary text below headline. 1–2 short sentences.
_slots.label: optional — short uppercase eyebrow tag above headline (e.g. 'CHAPTER 1', 'SPEAKER').
_slots.position: optional — where content appears: bottom-left (default), bottom-center, bottom-right, top-left, top-center, top-right, center.
_slots.lower-third: optional — set to any value (e.g. 'yes') to render as a broadcast-style lower-third bar. Overrides position.
_slots.accent: optional — accent hex color for rules, labels, decorative elements. Vary per layer. Default: #e8b86d
_slots.ink: optional — primary text hex color. Use the SAME value on every layer. Default: #ffffff
_slots.hide-backdrop: optional — set to any value to remove the dark backdrop behind text. Leave empty to keep it (default).
_slots.image: optional — small image (logo, avatar, icon) displayed next to text. Rendered as a circle.

title: Product Demo Overlays

slides.label: Introduction

slides.subtitle: Let's walk through the key features.
